Item Name: Funnel Cake Starter Kit
Bullet Point 1: Original Funnel Cake Mix, 16 oz.
Bullet Point 2: Apple Cinnamon Funnel Cake Mix, 16 oz.
Bullet Point 3: Funnel Cake Pitcher
Bullet Point 4: Metal Fry Ring
Bullet Point 5: Cooking Tongs & Sugar Shaker
Product Description: You can make up to 24 Funnel Cakes with this kit - just like you get at the carnival. Just add water to the mix, fry in a frying pan, top with powdered sugar & Voila! Color of pitcher & shaker varies (red or yellow). Kit contains 16 oz of original funnel cake mix, 16 oz of apple-cinnamon mix, metal fry ring, cooking tongs, and sugar shaker.
Value: 1.0
Unit: Count
overall_summary: A budget-friendly bundle deal offering a complete funnel cake-making kit with two flavors of mix and necessary tools. The packaging is standard cardboard, and the product is positioned as a fun, carnival-style treat rather than a premium or specialty item. The value lies in the included tools and dual-flavor mix, making it an affordable option for home cooking enthusiasts.

catalog_content:
Item Name: St. Elmo Steak House Creamy Horseradish, Great with Steaks and Other Meats
Bullet Point 1: CREAMY HORSERADISH – St. Elmo Creamy Horseradish has been served with our filet sliders and bone-in prime rib for decades. Nicknamed "Slammer Sauce" by our grill cooks, this savory flavor with a kick of horseradish complements steaks, and it's even better on roast beef, ham, and other sandwiches.
Bullet Point 2: FRESH & NATURAL INGREDIENTS – This sauce is made with zero artificial ingredients or preservatives. Boasting a powerful and refreshing taste, this mouthwatering horseradish sauce is sure to brighten your plate.
Bullet Point 3: THE PERFECT PAIR – This Creamy Horseradish can enhance nearly any dish. Spread it on subs, add a dollop to pork chops, or pair it with a filet. The options are limitless and, with St. Elmo Creamy Horseradish, you truly can’t go wrong.
Bullet Point 4: GLUTEN FREE & KOSHER – An easy and versatile way to upgrade any dish, this sauce is both gluten-free and kosher. With a delicious kick of heat and a subtle, sweet aftertaste, this sauce is unforgettable.
Bullet Point 5: CRAFTED WITH CARE – From our steakhouse to your home kitchen, you can enjoy this delicious St. Elmo sauce. Each 12 oz bottle delivers a deliciously creamy and powerful horseradish kick. Serve it to your guests at home, send it as a gift, or simply enjoy for yourself!
Product Description: This creamy horseradish has been served with our filet sliders and bone-in prime rib for decades. Nicknamed "Slammer Sauce" by our grill cooks, this savory flavor with a kick of horseradish compliments steaks and chops, and it's even better on roast beef, ham, and other sandwiches.
Value: 12.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium specialty sauce from a renowned steakhouse brand, positioned as a high-quality condiment with a premium price point. The packaging and branding emphasize craftsmanship and natural ingredients, justifying a higher cost compared to mass-market sauces. The gluten-free and kosher certifications add value for specific consumer segments. The 12 oz size offers good quantity for home use or gifting, reinforcing its premium positioning.
